name: flower-gift
description_fr: Les Pokémon alliés ont 1.5× leur Attaque et Défense Spéciale sous soleil intense si n’importe quel Pokémon allié a ce talent.  Contrairement à Météo, Multi-Type, et Mode Transe, ce talent n’est pas lié au changement de forme de son Pokémon; Ceriflor permutera entre ses formes même s’il perd ce talent.  Ainsi, ce talent fonctionne aussi si obtenu par un Pokémon autre que Ceriflor.
description_en: Friendly Pokémon have 1.5× their Attack and Special Defense during strong sunlight if any friendly Pokémon has this ability.  Unlike Forecast, Multitype, and Zen Mode, this ability is not tied to its Pokémon's form change; Cherrim will switch between its forms even if it loses this ability.  As such, this ability also works if obtained by a Pokémon other than Cherrim.
